RenoiseScriptingTool.Author: FluxRhythm
RenoiseScriptingTool.Name: AlgoRhythm
RenoiseScriptingTool.Description: Algorithmic rhythm and phrase generator. Euclidean, Bresenham, Cellular Automata, Markov chains, Logistic map, and Perlin noise — with Evolve mode for self-mutating patterns. Writes to native Renoise phrases or sends live MIDI.
